title: manilkara balata var. hartii
intro: Manilkara balata var. hartii, also known as the Jamaican balata, is a variety of the Manilkara balata tree, native to Jamaica, and is a member of the Sapotaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory activities, and is valued for its ability to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Manilkara balata var. hartii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system, making it a sought-after herbal remedy. In traditional medicine, Manilkara balata var. hartii is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, where it is combined with other herbs to create remedies for a range of health issues.
